docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROSSINI VIDEO GROUP DBA COMTEL VIDEO PRODUCTS AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, BRAD DBA THE GRILL RECORDING STUDIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
